name: Messenger.Component.PortableComponent

aliases.name: ConcretePortableComponent
aliases.comment:
ConcretePortableComponent

Used when createing a portable component.

Use `translatePortableComponent` to create a `ConcreteUserComponent` from a `ConcretePortableComponent`.

The `scenemsg` type is replaced by `()` because you cannot send changescene message.
aliases.type: { init : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentInit userdata msg data, update : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentUpdate data userdata tar msg scenemsg, updaterec : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentUpdateRec data userdata tar msg scenemsg, view : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentView userdata data, matcher : Messenger.GeneralModel.Matcher data tar }

1.  From the old scene to the transition scene
2.  From the transition scene to the new scene

aliases.name: BasicUpdater
aliases.comment:
Basic Update Type

A basic updater type used to update the basic data of the layer with event.

Users can use it as the first step of the update process
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata -> Messenger.Base.UserEvent -> data -> ( data, List.List (Messenger.Scene.Scene.MMsg tar msg scenemsg userdata), ( Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata, Basics.Bool ) )

aliases.name: Distributor
aliases.comment:
Distributor Type

A distributor is used to generate several list of Component Msgs for corresponding components list.

The `cmsgpacker` is a custom type to store the component msgs and their targets. Specifically, a `cmsgpacker` type should be
a record of different `List ( ComponentTarget, ComponentMsg )`.
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata -> Messenger.Base.UserEvent -> data -> ( data, ( List.List (Messenger.Scene.Scene.MMsg tar msg scenemsg userdata), cmsgpacker ), Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata )
